topic: There is a window in my apartment that is not on the floor plan
title: There Is a Window in My Apartment That Is Not on the Floor Plan and It Shows the Wrong View | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a window in my hallway that does not exist from outside the building.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small square wood framed window set into an interior plaster wall, a heavy yellowed cotton curtain partially drawn aside, the view through the glass showing a sunny suburban backyard with a wooden swing set, contrasting with the dim apartment interior, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Studio walk up. Third floor. Brooklyn. Lived here two years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a four story brick walk up building at dusk, fire escapes on the facade, a single warm window glowing on the third floor, narrow city street, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Found it last December cleaning out the coat closet.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open coat closet interior, winter coats pushed aside on a hanger rod, exposing a section of plaster wall with a brass curtain rod, dim overhead bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small. Square. Built into the wall behind a curtain I never opened.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small square wood framed window set into an interior plaster wall, a heavy yellowed cotton curtain hanging straight across the front, dim hallway lamp light, peeling paint at the corners, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: View is a backyard with a swing set. My building has no backyard.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot through a small interior window pane showing a fenced suburban backyard with a wooden A frame swing set in mid afternoon light, the swing still, no people, the glass slightly fogged at the edges, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went outside and counted the windows on my floor. Two. Mine should be three.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a brick apartment building facade at midday, the third floor windows clearly visible and countable, two windows on that floor, neighboring buildings on either side, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked my landlord. He said there is no third window. He came up to check.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of an apartment hallway, a man in a flannel shirt seen from behind facing a section of wall, his hand reaching for a heavy yellowed curtain, dim ambient lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Curtain pulled back. Brick wall behind it. He left.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an interior plaster wall with a heavy curtain pulled fully aside, exposed red brick visible behind it where a window should be, dim ambient apartment light, the curtain rod still mounted above, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I waited until midnight and looked again. The backyard was there. The swing was moving.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot through the small interior window at night, the backyard outside dim with a single distant porch light, the wooden swing visibly mid arc with slight motion blur, no figure in the swing, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week a girl was sitting in the swing. She was watching me.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot through the same small interior window at dusk, a young girl seated on the wooden swing seen from a distance in the backyard, her body angled toward the window, her face indistinct from this distance, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I taped the curtain shut last month. I have not opened it since.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an interior window with masking tape applied in an X across a heavy yellowed curtain, the curtain pinned at the edges with thumbtacks, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She knows my name. I hear her say it through the wall every night at three.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an interior plaster wall at night beside a covered curtain, dim ambient hallway light, an ear pressed listening against the wall surface from inside the apartment, no full figure visible, vertical 9:16 framing
